title: Void's Durability Overlay
description: colors armors depending on their durability
body:
### **Please consult server rules before using this pack on servers**                        
                                    
                        
(Netherite and diamond) armors change color from green to red based on their durability (+cyan at full durablity) (model only for now)               
                               
Feedback and support: discord - name:"silvrvr"
